enriched_metadata.objective: Integrate academic, demographic, behavioral, and psychological factors to analyze student performance and learning behavior for predictive modeling and adaptive learning research
enriched_metadata.sources: Comprehensive anonymized student records with behavioral and performance data
enriched_metadata.features_description: 16 features including study behaviors, engagement patterns, resources usage, motivation, psychological factors, demographics, learning styles, and academic performance metrics
enriched_metadata.representativity_description: 14,003 anonymized student records covering diverse behaviors and characteristics across different learning styles and performance levels
enriched_metadata.sample_balance_description: Well-balanced distribution across learning styles, age groups (18-30), genders, and performance levels
enriched_metadata.missing_values_description: Clean dataset with no missing values - comprehensive data collection
enriched_metadata.data_errors_description: High-quality educational dataset with comprehensive behavioral analysis capabilities. Some ethical considerations could be improved regarding transparency and user control.
